text: Lesson 133 Sensational news!
Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 聽錄音，然後回答這個問題。

text: What reasons did Karen Marsh give for wanting to retire?
zh: 凯伦·马什给出了哪些想要退休的理由？
zh_hant: 凱倫·馬什給出了哪些想要退休的理由？

text: Have you just made a new film, Miss Marsh?
zh: 马什小姐，您刚拍完一部新电影吗？
zh_hant: 馬什小姐，您剛拍完一部新電影嗎？

text: Yes, I have.
Are you going to make another?
No, I'm not.
I'm going to retire.
I feel very tired.
I don't want to make another film for a long time.
zh: 我很长一段时间内都不想再拍电影了。
zh_hant: 我很長一段時間內都不想再拍電影了。

text: Let's buy a newspaper, Liz.
zh: 丽兹，我们去买份报纸吧。
zh_hant: 麗茲，我們去買份報紙吧。

text: Listen to this!
'Karen Marsh: Sensational News!
By our reporter, Alan Jones.
zh: 本报记者艾伦·琼斯报道。
zh_hant: 本報記者艾倫·瓊斯報道。

text: Karen Marsh arrived at London Airport today.
zh: 凯伦·马什今天抵达伦敦机场。
zh_hant: 凱倫·馬什今天抵達倫敦機場。

text: She was wearing a blue dress and a mink coat.
zh: 她穿着一条蓝色连衣裙和一件貂皮大衣。
zh_hant: 她穿著一條藍色連衣裙和一件貂皮大衣。

text: She told me she had just made a new film.
zh: 她告诉我她刚拍完一部新电影。
zh_hant: 她告訴我她剛拍完一部新電影。

text: she said she was not going to make another.
She said she was going to retire.
She told reporters she felt very tired and didn't want to make another film for a long time.'
zh: 她告诉记者，她感到非常疲惫，很长一段时间内都不想再拍电影了。'
zh_hant: 她告訴記者，她感到非常疲憊，很長一段時間內都不想再拍電影了。'

text: I wonder why!
